variants: Rakel Steinthorsdottir is a Dance Therapy specialist who actively participates in the Verdigris Luthiers Society. The Horizon Climber Consortium is the primary funding source that supports her research and initiatives in therapeutic dance, allowing her to pursue her innovative ideas in the field.
